query:
-- 查看迁移后的统计数据
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%') as total_teachers,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM user_role_cities WHERE role = 'teacher') as teachers_with_mapping,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_role_cities WHERE role = 'teacher') as total_mapping_records;

-- 查看所有老师的城市映射（前20个）
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  urc.cities,
  JSON_LENGTH(urc.cities) as city_count
FROM users u
JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND urc.role = 'teacher'
ORDER BY u.name
LIMIT 20;

-- 查看所有老师的城市映射（前20个）
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
